method: Terms verified against primary documents (avisos de resultados + suplementos de prospecto from issuer IR sites / placement-agent mirrors of CNV-filed docs), cross-checked with bonistas snapshot, IOL/Rava titles and financial press. Remaining cashflows computed per 100 VN original face for payments strictly after 2026-06-10, on each bond's documented day count (30/360 for NY-law classes, actual/365 for YPF Clase XLII per its suplemento). Prices on BYMA are dirty per 100 VN original.
generalCaveats: Payment dates are scheduled dates; if a date falls on a non-business day, payment rolls to the next business day without additional interest (per each suplemento) — cashflows here use scheduled dates.
VSCX interest day-count basis is assumed 30/360 (make-whole language + market standard); verify in Vista Clase XXXI suplemento de prospecto (2026-03-30) on CNV AIF.
Outstanding amounts after fungible reopenings (YM34, YM42, YMCX) not fully verified; does not affect per-100-VN terms.
bonistas API wrongly reports YMCX as bullet — corrected here from primary docs (20/20/60).

Adversarial verification 2026-06-10: all five instruments re-derived from sources independent of the originals (argen.bond, Docta Capital, Cohen/BYMA fichas); zero term corrections needed. Golden TIR check vs Docta passed for all five with |delta| <= 0.003pp at data912 D-line closes, settlement 2026-06-11. MGCR scheduled payment dates (14-Nov) fall on Saturdays in 2026 and 2037; aggregators show rolled dates (16-Nov).

instruments.name: YPF Obligaciones Negociables Clase XXXIV 8,25% 2034 (USD, Ley NY)
instruments.lawDetail: Ley del Estado de Nueva York (suplemento de prospecto, seccion 'Ley Aplicable'); emitida bajo Regimen de Emisor Frecuente CNV

instruments.issueDetail: Original VN US$1,100,000,000 issued 2025-01-17 at 98.561%; reopened (ONs adicionales, fungible) in late 2025 per press (Ambito: +US$300-500mn target) — reopening amount not verified from primary source.

minDenomination.detail: Denominaciones minimas de US$1,00 y multiplos integrales de US$1,00 (suplemento). Primary-market subscription orders had to be >= US$1.000, but secondary-trading minimum denomination is VN US$1.
